texto: Depression is such a cruel punishment. There are no fevers, no rashes, no blood tests to send people scurrying in concern, just the slow erosion of self, as insidious as cancer. And like cancer, it is essentially a solitary experience; a room in hell with only your name on the door
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Martha Manning: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Depression is such a cruel punishment. There are no fevers, no rashes, no blood tests to send peo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, depression, cancer pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
